title: Bihai ferdinando-coburgi
intro:
I couldn't find any information on the plant Bihai ferdinando-coburgi. However, I found a plant called Bajai (also known as Bajaji) but I couldn't find much about that either. I believe you are referring to Bidens ferdinandi-coburgii, which is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae.

Here's a paragraph about the plant Bidens ferdinandi-coburgii:

Bidens ferdinandi-coburgii, also known as Ferdinand's beggartick or Beggar's tick, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, which can help to treat various health issues such as skin infections, wounds, and respiratory problems. The bioactive constituents of Bidens ferdinandi-coburgii include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. Bidens ferdinandi-coburgii is often used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat a range of health conditions.
